prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约11543→11958→10101→23909→27864，整体呈后移趋势，尤其2024年新高考首年位次从10101骤降至23909，2025年 继续后移至27864，近两年累计后移约17763名，2025年基准约27864名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划：2021年70人、2022年71人、2023年70人、2024年79人、2 025年79人，2026年计划103人，较2025年扩招约30.4%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第80 名，近年排名稳定在第79–83名区间，学校层次稳固；2026年声誉偏负面（涉及学术不端事件2起）；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报 考）；抖音热度一般（总排名第77位），短视频曝光量中等偏低，整体报考关注度未出现明显升温信号；管理科学与工程为A级学科（第五轮学科评估），是该 校唯一A-及以上学科，与物流管理等招生专业有直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续 偏热，与该校工科专业设置匹配；本省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，较2025年总人数（约179817人）增长约21.6%，物理类估算约147623人，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于安徽省宣城市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；甘肃省考生赴外省就读的意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校为211层次， 跨省吸引力尚可。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（30.4%）对竞争的缓解作用、本省考生规模扩大（约21.6%）对竞争的加剧作用，以及声誉偏负 面、抖音热度一般的综合判断，考虑扩招幅度大于考生增长幅度，竞争略有缓解，预测2026年物理类最低位次约32642名，区间32142–33142名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 11543 → 11958 → 10101 → 23909 → 27864, showing an overall backward trend. Especially in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination, the ranking dropped sharply from 10101 to 23909, and continued to move back to 27864 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17763 places over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 27864. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province: 70 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 79 in 2024, 79 in 2025, and 103 in 2026, an increase of about 30.4% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 79–83 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level. In 2026, reputation is slightly negative (involving 2 academic misconduct incidents); in 2025, reputation was slightly negative (popular majors' admission scores plummeted, some majors had no applicants). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 77th), short video exposure is moderately low, and overall application attention has not shown a clear warming signal. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Logistics Management, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high, matching the university's engineering major offerings. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 2025 (approximately 179,817). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 147,623, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university in this province, so there is no local enrollment preference. Gansu candidates' willingness to study outside the province is influenced by regional preferences, but as a 211-level university, its cross-provincial appeal is acceptable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the mitigating effect of the significant enrollment expansion (30.4%) in 2026 on competition, the intensifying effect of the provincial candidate pool expansion (about 21.6%) on competition, and the overall judgment of slightly negative reputation and average Douyin popularity, given that the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, competition is slightly alleviated. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 32642, with a range of 32142–33142.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 32642, range 32142–33142. It is recommended that candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (32142) focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors (Electrical, Intelligent, Mechanical); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 32642) should target Tier 2 majors as the main direction, while also attempting Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (33142) should primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options, and may attempt Tier 2 majors. This university is at the 211 level, and engineering majors generally have good employment prospects. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2384 → 2409 → 2473 → 2559 → 2554, with minimal overall fluctuation. Over the past 5 years, rankings have stabilized in the 2384–2559 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 2554. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for History Category: 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and only 2 in 2026, a drastic reduction of 75% compared to 2025, leading to significantly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years and a solid university level. In 2026, reputation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident); Douyin popularity is average (77th overall). History Category majors at the Xuancheng Campus are limited to English and Network and New Media, with overall low attention. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, but has no direct relevance to History Category enrollment majors (English, Network and New Media). The university has relatively few advantageous disciplines in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: English major social popularity is generally wait-and-see; Network and New Media major social popularity is clearly discouraged (Journalism and Communication category). In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in this province is approximately 218,700, with History Category estimated at about 71,078, an increase of about 21.8% compared to 2025's 58,374, indicating a significant expansion in candidate numbers. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university. History Category has few enrollment majors and extremely limited spots, making cross-province application more contingent.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings, the sharp drop in 2026 enrollment plan from 8 to 2 (a 75% reduction), and the approximately 21.8% increase in local History Category candidates, competition will significantly intensify, and rankings are expected to move notably forward (numerical decrease). Given that the reduction magnitude far exceeds the candidate growth magnitude, the competition intensification effect is strong. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is about 1355, with a range of 1111–1599.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1355, range 1111–1599. This university's History Category in Gansu only offers English and Network and New Media majors, with only 2 spots in 2026, making competition extremely intense. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (1111) can aim for the English major; those in the middle of the range need careful evaluation; those near the upper limit (1599) have a lower admission probability. It is recommended to also consider other institutions with larger enrollment plans as backups.
